measured_dimensions.z_extent_interpretation: CAD-measured; matches the manufacturer-confirmed configured belt width (10 mm, width code '100')
measured_dimensions.x_extent_interpretation: CAD-measured only; does NOT correspond to the 540 mm circumference or any half-loop length expected from the configuration. The body is a simplified rounded-end strip, not a true belt-loop model.
measured_dimensions.y_extent_interpretation: CAD-measured; exceeds the nominal 10 mm width, consistent with a generic placeholder cross-section rather than a true tooth profile (which per the spec table has H=1.94mm tooth height on a ~? mm back thickness).

tooth_geometry_from_spec_table_NOT_cad.evidence_basis: manufacturer-confirmed (family spec table, S3M Type dimension row) -- CAD does not model these features

conclusion: CAD usable only for a coarse width/thickness sanity check (10 mm width confirms). Pitch length, tooth count, and tooth profile must be taken from the manufacturer spec table / configured product page, NOT from this CAD body.
